title: Well-formed CRUD API — correct naming, status codes, error model, ETag
code_snippet:
GET    /api/v1/users         → 200 {data: [...], meta: {total, cursor}}
GET    /api/v1/users/{id}    → 200 {data: {...}} + ETag
POST   /api/v1/users         → 201 + Location + Idempotency-Key support
PUT    /api/v1/users/{id}    → 200 + If-Match required
PATCH  /api/v1/users/{id}    → 200
DELETE /api/v1/users/{id}    → 204

Errors: {error: {code, message, details[], trace_id}}
Auth: JWT per endpoint, object-level authz check
Rate limit: 429 + Retry-After
expected_feedback: No violations. Correctly implements REST API conventions: (1) plural noun resources, (2) semantic HTTP methods, (3) correct status codes (201 Created, 204 No Content), (4) structured error model with stable codes, (5) ETag/If-Match for concurrency, (6) Idempotency-Key for POST, (7) cursor pagination, (8) object-level authorization, (9) rate limiting with 429 + Retry-After.
